title: arnica spathulata subsp. eastwoodiae
intro: Arnica spathulata subsp. eastwoodiae is a rare and endemic subspecies of the arnica plant, typically found in the western United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, bruises, and swelling. The health benefits of Arnica spathulata subsp. eastwoodiae include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a topical cream, ointment, or salve, and is also used in herbal teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
